glossary.subject: Invalid Order details have been received for Order type: {{ mappings.orderType }} and Order No: {{ mappings.orderNumber }}
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

Order in subject has failed validation and aborted.
Please check {{ mappings.url }} with the order number {{mappings.orderNumber}} for more information.

Thank You
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
